description: Degraded path (Phase 5.1): agent calls web_search via client tool; Tavily returns an error, agent surfaces 'news lookup unavailable' in caveats.

key_factors: Model has surface-Elo signal even without news
Recent H2H shows back-and-forth on different surfaces
input.narrative: Without recent news, the model's surface and form signals are the only inputs. Surface-Elo favours Alcaraz on clay; the H2H is competitive but Alcaraz holds the edge on this surface specifically. Treat the probability as a model-only read.
